title: Module 1
content:
Introduction: safety programs- Accident and Loss statistics(Simple
Calculations)- Acceptable Risk- Nature of Accident process- Design
principles- Conceptual design and detailed design- Flow diagrams-
Equipment Specifications- Reliability and safety in designing- Inherently
safer design- Engineered Safety. Process and plant hazards: Hazards of
pressure- Causes for overpressures- Flow deviations- Effects of
leakages/releases- hazards of temperature- Cryogenic fluids- Vibration and
noise- Human errors-Ergonomics
Toxicity-Effects of Toxicants on Biological Organisms- Dose versus
response curve- Threshold limit values- Permissible Exposure Levels
Industrial Hygiene: Properties of chemicals- OSHA: Process Safety
Management- EPA: Risk Management Plan- Material Safety Data Sheet-
Estimating work exposure to toxic vapours- Estimating the vaporization rate
of a liquid- Estimating worker exposure during vessel filling operations-
Control Techniques: Respirators- Ventilation.

title: Module 2
content:
Fires and Explosions: Fire triangle- Flammability characteristics of liquids
and vapours- Flammability Diagram- Ignition energy- Auto ignition- Auto
oxidation- Ignition sources- Explosions-Detonations and Deflagration,
Confined explosions, Blast damage resulting from overpressure, TNT
equivalency- Energy of chemical, mechanical explosions, Vapour cloud
explosions, Boiling liquid expanding vapour explosions(BLEVE)- Inerting-
Vaccum purging- Pressure purging- Design methods to prevent electrostatic
ignitions- Relaxation- Bonding and Grounding- Dip pipes- Sprinkler systems

title: Module 3
content:
Explosion Protection: Containment- Detection- Control- use of fail safe
devices- venting- isolation- suppression. Fire Protection: fireproofing- water
deluge- water spray systems- emergency scrubbing. Safety for confined
space entry- Lockout/Tagout Procedures- Personnel protective systems
Relief Valves: Conventional pressure relief valve- Balanced pressure relief
valve- Pilot operated pressure relief valve- Temperature activated relief
valve system Rupture disc- Rupture pin- Breather vents for storage tanks-
Explosion vents- Flame arrestors.

title: Module 4
content:
Scrubbers- Flares- Destructive Testing- Non-destructive testing methods-
Thermochemical screening- Colour coding for pipelines and cylinders-
Condition monitoring- Control valves- safety valves- bypass valves.
Commissioning- Pre-commissioning- start-up and post commissioning-
Planning for major emergencies- identification of major hazard situations
and assessment of risk, works organisation for major emergencies,
Emergency control centre, Assembly points- Evacuation for personnel.
Accident Investigations: Learning from accidents- layered investigations-
investigation process- investigation summary- aids for diagnosis- aids for
recommendations.
